title: Jump Range Profile
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FSDJump WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT CASE WHEN JumpDist < 10 THEN '< 10 ly' WHEN JumpDist < 20 THEN '10–20 ly' WHEN JumpDist < 30 THEN '20–30 ly' WHEN JumpDist < 40 THEN '30–40 ly' WHEN JumpDist < 50 THEN '40–50 ly' ELSE '50+ ly' END AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM FSDJump WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY MIN(JumpDist)
